---

name: CI/CD Issue
about: Report issues or improvements related to build, deployment, or automation pipelines
title: "[CI/CD] "
labels: CI/CD
assignees: ""
-------------

## Summary

A clear and concise description of the CI/CD issue or improvement request.

## Problem Statement

Describe the problem you're experiencing with the pipeline, deployment process, or automation workflow.  
If applicable, please link the failing workflow.

## Pipeline Stage

Which stage is affected?

* [ ] Build
* [ ] Test
* [ ] Code Quality / Linting
* [ ] Packaging
* [ ] Release
* [ ] Deployment
* [ ] Infrastructure Provisioning
* [ ] Monitoring / Notifications

## Environment

Where did the issue occur?

* [ ] Pull Request Validation
* [ ] Development
* [ ] Staging
* [ ] Production
* [ ] Local CI Environment

## Affected Components

Which components are impacted?

* [ ] Frontend (Angular Control Panel)
* [ ] Overlays (Score-Box, Map-Screen, Commentator-Box, Info-Box)
* [ ] Backend (ASP.NET Core, SignalR, Database)
* [ ] Docker Containers
* [ ] Deployment / Infrastructure
* [ ] Documentation

## Expected Behavior

Describe what should happen.

## Actual Behavior

Describe what actually happened.

## Logs and Error Messages

Include relevant logs, workflow output, screenshots, or error messages.

```text
Paste logs here
```

## Proposed Solution

If you have ideas for resolving the issue or improving the pipeline, describe them here.

## Additional Context

* Related workflow, job, or deployment target?
* Frequency: Always / Intermittent / One-time
* Impact: Low / Medium / High / Critical
* Any recent infrastructure or configuration changes?
